name: GOLFTEC Mission Viejo
about: GOLFTEC Mission Viejo is a golf training and club fitting studio specializing in data-driven instruction using advanced technology. The facility offers personalized golf lessons, practice sessions with launch monitors and video feedback, and custom club fittings. Services are designed for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, with coaching available to improve swing mechanics and on-course performance. The studio utilizes high-speed cameras, OPTIMOTION motion capture, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback and club fitting.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION swing tracking and launch monitors
Personalized coaching with data-driven feedback for faster improvement
Custom club fitting with top brands and average 21-yard distance increase

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. However, the facility also offers club rentals and custom club fittings if you don't have equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so it's best to assume outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, typical simulator sessions take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and youth coaching, making it suitable for kids interested in learning golf, though it's primarily a training-focused environment.
